Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ContentAsset

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MetadataWithContent
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ContentAsset
public class ContentAsset extends MetadataWithContent

Java class for ContentAsset complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContentAsset">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MetadataWithContent">
       <sequence>
         <element name="format" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ContentAssetFormat" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isVisibleByExternalUsers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="originNetwork" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="relationships" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ContentAssetRelationships" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ContentAssetVersions"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
